---
title: Mathieu<br> Cayla
#<!--cover-img: /assets/img/people/nathaliathompson.jpg-->
role: Lab Head
alumni_name: "Mathieu Cayla"
categories:
  - lab head
rank: 1
page-layout: article
image: ../../assets/img/people/mathieucayla.png
toc: false
email: mathieu.cayla@york.ac.uk
orcid: 0000-0002-3731-7947
labdate: "2022 Oct."
labdate-end:
---

### Email address: 

mathieu.cayla@york.ac.uk

### Post: 

Lab Head

### Start date: 

October 2022
